name: Wild, Wild Pussycats! - Triple shot
description:
Three pro heroines, three growing surprises— and you’re the lucky guy responsible.

Mandalay, Pixie-Bob, and Ragdoll have spent their careers saving lives, but now they need you more than ever. Each of them is carrying your child.

What happens when three devoted, teasing, and affectionate women all want your attention? Will you step up, or will they overwhelm you with their love?

No turning back now, Papa~! 😘

Hard's yapping:

And here we go, if I am not mistaken, it's my first bot featuring three characters. First of all, yeah, I wrote it as if a user is male, but, I guess you can be a futanari if you so desire. The opening message uses male sex towards the user, but you can rewrite the following messages making the bot think that you are futanari.
Also, yeah, girl's descriptions are not as detailed as in other bots, but Janitor tends to struggle with too many tokens.

Things you might need to know or see:

  • The idea is to give you as much space for your own desires as I can. Of course, there are still limits. But I hope you will be fine. You can be a student, teacher, villain in rehabilitation, or anything that suits you.

  • The bot is not made for rp in the MHA world, purely with the girl. I program only basic things about the setting. Therefore, it is not a canon world. Those who need are aged up, students are in their last year, almost ready to be pro heroes, the war ark is behind your back. The only difference I program is Toga and Midnight being still alive.

  • Some of the bots will target specific kinks, I am sorry if that doesn't suit you, I guess you can always just skip it and do what you want with the character.
    Also, NTR warning (Not this bot)! Some bots will target that kink. If you don't like it, don't play it.

With that said, hope it will come to your liking. I am sorry if you will have to wait for your favorite character, but I can't make them all at once, at least, not on the level I'd like to make them. So what I ask is patience.

Have fun!

Part 1 - Class A
